patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,1 +1,24 @@
+# Credentials for messaging platforms
+# https://rasa.com/docs/rasa/messaging-and-voice-channels
+
+# REST API - For your web/mobile app
 rest:
+
+# Uncomment below if you need other platforms later
+
+# Socket.IO for real-time chat
+#socketio:
+#  user_message_evt: user_uttered
+#  bot_message_evt: bot_uttered
+#  session_persistence: true
+
+# Facebook Messenger
+#facebook:
+#  verify: "rasa-bot"
+#  secret: "your-facebook-secret"
+#  page-access-token: "your-page-access-token"
+
+# Slack
+#slack:
+#  slack_token: "xoxb-your-slack-token"
+#  slack_channel: "general"
\ No newline at end of file

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# Credentials for messaging platforms
# https://rasa.com/docs/rasa/messaging-and-voice-channels

# ========================================
# ACTIVE: REST API for Web/Mobile App
# ========================================
rest:
# No credentials needed for REST channel
# This allows your web/app to communicate with RASA via HTTP API


# ========================================
# OPTIONAL: Uncomment these if needed
# ========================================

# Socket.IO for real-time chat
#socketio:
#  user_message_evt: user_uttered
#  bot_message_evt: bot_uttered
#  session_persistence: true

# Facebook Messenger
#facebook:
#  verify: "rasa-bot"
#  secret: "your-facebook-secret"
#  page-access-token: "your-page-access-token"

# Slack
#slack:
#  slack_token: "xoxb-your-slack-token"
#  slack_channel: "general"
